title: Bhander Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bhander, with a Z-Score of +4.57. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Bhander is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is relatively low at 23%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 13.3 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
